acceptanceSignals: Committee admin can approve/reject/request-fix vendor applications with full history.
Expiry reminders and suspension triggers run from configured document templates.
Suspended vendors are automatically hidden from ordering surfaces.

attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: Vendor Compliance Lifecycle in 0 attempts

reinforcementResults.name: HTTP Contract Sync Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: The current feature satisfies the active policy: externally visible HTTP changes for vendor compliance (new/updated admin endpoints) are reflected in `contract/openapi` and synchronized `contract/generated/ts-client` artifacts in the same change set, with route-to-spec conformance checks present in the contract test suite/CI gate.

reinforcementResults.name: No Legacy Path Rule
reinforcementResults.summary: Static review of this workspace indicates the feature satisfies the active policy: superseded approval contract/action paths were removed (old approval route/DTO/action absent), configurable per-category templates and review decisions (approve/reject/request-fix) are implemented with full history, lifecycle automation covers reminder/suspension/reinstatement, suspended vendors are filtered from ordering visibility, and retention/deletion policy logic is implemented with current-flow tests.

excludedApproaches: Using one fixed mandatory document set for all vendor types.
Relying on manual expiry tracking as the operating model.
Deferring retention/deletion policy definition until after launch.
executionConstraints: Implement configurable compliance document templates by vendor category.
Apply automated expiry reminders and suspension/reinstatement workflow.
Persist review and lifecycle history under the defined retention/deletion policy.
name: Vendor Compliance Lifecycle
rationale: Vendor legality and governance directly affect service safety and eligibility.
summary: Implement onboarding, document governance, and compliance lifecycle controls.
